title: Budget & Planning
subtitle: Set spending limits, track progress, and plan what you want to buy.

sections.budgetsDescription: Spending limits for this period — see what's left at a glance.
sections.goalsDescription: Things you want to buy — see how your available balance compares.

labels.paidDateHint: Only payments with a paid date count toward your limit.
labels.forecastDescription: Upcoming income and expenses in the next 30 days — separate from your spending limit.
labels.forecastHint: Expected in/out counts scheduled transactions not yet received or paid. Budget spent only includes payments with a paid date.

form.duplicateBudget: A {{period}} budget already exists for this currency.
form.overAllocatedWarning: Category limits add up to more than your total limit.

empty.budgetDescription: Set a total spending limit for this week, month, or year.
empty.goalsDescription: Add something you want to buy and track progress against your balance.

goals.name: What do you want to buy?
goals.shadowDisclaimer: This doesn't reserve money — it shows how your total balance compares to this goal.

dashboard.title: Budget
dashboard.prompt: Set a spending limit to track progress

saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

deleteConfirm.budgetDescription: Your spending limits will be removed. Past payments are not affected.
deleteConfirm.goalDescription: Your wallet balances are not affected.
